evidence_records.extracted_content: public class AesCipherService extends DefaultBlockCipherService { public AesCipherService() { super("AES"); setKeySize(128); setMode(OperationMode.GCM); } }
evidence_records.explanation: AesCipherService calls super("AES"), sets default key size to 128 bits and mode to GCM. Direct source confirms AES-GCM with 128-bit default key.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import javax.crypto.CipherInputStream; import javax.crypto.spec.IvParameterSpec; import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec; import java.security.SecureRandom; import java.security.spec.AlgorithmParameterSpec;
evidence_records.explanation: JcaCipherService imports IvParameterSpec, SecretKeySpec, SecureRandom confirming JCA-based symmetric cipher with IV support. Full method body needed to confirm IV generation call site — context_sufficient flagged false pending deep read.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.bouncycastle.crypto.generators.OpenBSDBCrypt; public static final String DEFAULT_ALGORITHM_NAME = "bcrypt2y"; public static final int DEFAULT_COST = 10; public static final int SALT_LENGTH = 16; protected String crypt(byte[] bytes, byte[] salt) { return OpenBSDBCrypt.generate(bytes, salt, DEFAULT_COST); }
evidence_records.explanation: BCryptHash uses BouncyCastle OpenBSDBCrypt.generate() with DEFAULT_COST=10 and SALT_LENGTH=16. Algorithm name 'bcrypt2y' confirmed.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.bouncycastle.crypto.generators.Argon2BytesGenerator; import org.bouncycastle.crypto.params.Argon2Parameters; public static final String DEFAULT_ALGORITHM_NAME = "argon2id"; Argon2Parameters.Builder builder = new Argon2Parameters.Builder(Argon2Parameters.ARGON2_id).withVersion(Argon2Parameters.ARGON2_VERSION_13);
evidence_records.explanation: Argon2Hash uses BouncyCastle Argon2BytesGenerator with argon2id variant and VERSION_13. Default parameters (memory, iterations, parallelism) require further source read for exact values.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public static final String DEFAULT_HASH_ALGORITHM = "argon2id"; DefaultHashService defaultHashService = new DefaultHashService(); defaultHashService.setHashAlgorithmName(DEFAULT_HASH_ALGORITHM); this.hashService = defaultHashService; this.hashFormatFactory = new DefaultHashFormatFactory();
evidence_records.explanation: DefaultPasswordService sets DEFAULT_HASH_ALGORITHM='argon2id' and wires DefaultHashService. Shiro2CryptFormat is the output encoder.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.apache.shiro.crypto.cipher.AesCipherService; protected byte[] encrypt(byte[] serialized) { byte[] cipherKey = getCipherKey(); return getCipherService().encrypt(serialized, cipherKey); } protected byte[] decrypt(byte[] encrypted) { byte[] cipherKey = getCipherKey(); return getCipherService().decrypt(encrypted, cipherKey); }
evidence_records.explanation: AbstractRememberMeManager calls AesCipherService.encrypt/decrypt for RememberMe principal. getCipherKey() allows operator-supplied key — default key reconstructable risk documented. IV generation delegated to AesCipherService (AT-002).

evidence_records.extracted_content: private int byteLength = 16; private SecureRandom secureRandom; public SecureRandomNumberGenerator() { this.secureRandom = new SecureRandom(); } public ByteSource nextBytes() { byte[] bytes = new byte[byteLength]; getSecureRandom().nextBytes(bytes); return new SimpleByteSource(bytes); }
evidence_records.explanation: SecureRandomNumberGenerator uses java.security.SecureRandom with default 16-byte (128-bit) output. Used for salt generation in hash operations.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class CipherKeyGenerator implements CipherKeySupplier { @Override public String get() { return "34D7E5C61B87A38C971B3716AED7899E"; } }
evidence_records.explanation: CipherKeyGenerator returns a hardcoded 32-char hex string (128-bit AES key). Located in integration-tests/jakarta-ee — test/integration fixture, not production code. security_concern=hardcoded_key_or_secret.

evidence_records.extracted_content: protected boolean isAccessAllowed(ServletRequest request, ...) { return ((HttpServletRequest) request).isSecure(); }
evidence_records.explanation: SslFilter checks request.isSecure() to enforce HTTPS. HSTS support via maxAge and includeSubDomains properties confirmed from Javadoc. Transport security boundary.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import java.security.MessageDigest; protected MessageDigest getMessageDigest() throws NoSuchAlgorithmException { return MessageDigest.getInstance(getAlgorithmName()); }
evidence_records.explanation: SimpleHash calls MessageDigest.getInstance(algorithmName) — pluggable JCA hash. Default algorithm set by caller; Sha256Hash passes 'SHA-256'.

evidence_records.extracted_content: <bouncycastle.version>1.84</bouncycastle.version>
evidence_records.explanation: Root pom.xml declares BouncyCastle version 1.84. Used by BCryptHash (OpenBSDBCrypt) and Argon2Hash (Argon2BytesGenerator). This is the cryptographic library dependency boundary.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class Sha256Hash extends SimpleHash { public static final String ALGORITHM_NAME = "SHA-256"; public Sha256Hash() { super(ALGORITHM_NAME); } }
evidence_records.explanation: Sha256Hash extends SimpleHash with ALGORITHM_NAME='SHA-256'. Confirms concrete SHA-2 wrapper pattern. Same pattern applies to Sha384Hash and Sha512Hash.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class BlowfishCipherService extends DefaultBlockCipherService { public BlowfishCipherService() { super("Blowfish"); } }
evidence_records.explanation: BlowfishCipherService extends DefaultBlockCipherService with 'Blowfish' algorithm. Blowfish is a legacy weak algorithm. Active usage and caller context needed to determine security_concern severity.

evidence_records.extracted_content: private String authenticationMechanism; ... if (StringUtils.hasText(getAuthenticationMechanism())) { env.put(Context.SECURITY_AUTHENTICATION, getAuthenticationMechanism()); }
evidence_records.explanation: JndiLdapContextFactory passes authenticationMechanism (e.g. DIGEST-MD5) to JNDI InitialLdapContext. Cryptographic mechanism is configuration-driven; actual algorithm determined at runtime by JNDI provider.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.apache.shiro.lang.codec.Base64; public class CookieRememberMeManager extends AbstractRememberMeManager { public static final String DEFAULT_REMEMBER_ME_COOKIE_NAME = "rememberMe"; }
evidence_records.explanation: CookieRememberMeManager extends AbstractRememberMeManager (AES encrypt/decrypt via AT-006) and uses Base64 for cookie encoding. Inherits AES-GCM encryption. Cookie name 'rememberMe' default confirmed.

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.apache.shiro.authc.credential.DefaultPasswordService; import org.apache.shiro.crypto.SecureRandomNumberGenerator; import org.apache.shiro.crypto.hash.DefaultHashService; import org.apache.shiro.crypto.hash.format.Shiro2CryptFormat; DefaultPasswordService passwordService = new DefaultPasswordService(); passwordService.setHashFormat(new Shiro2CryptFormat());

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class MapCache<K, V> implements Cache<K, V> { private final Map<K, V> map; public V get(K key) { return map.get(key); } public V put(K key, V value) { return map.put(key, value); } }

evidence_records.explanation: BearerToken holds an auth token string. No crypto operations — purely an AuthenticationToken data holder. 'token' is an HTTP Bearer token string, not cryptographic key material. Confirmed lexical false positive.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class PermissionUtils { public static Set<Permission> resolvePermissions(String permissionsString, PermissionResolver resolver) { ... } }
evidence_records.explanation: PermissionUtils resolves permission strings. No JCA/JCE imports. 'sign' grep hit likely from permission domain string parsing. Confirmed lexical false positive.

evidence_records.explanation: SimpleHash calls MessageDigest.getInstance(algorithmName) — pluggable JCA hash algorithm. Subclasses Sha256Hash, Sha384Hash, Sha512Hash pass concrete algorithm names. Verified from preliminary_call_sites and imports.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public interface CipherKeySupplier extends Supplier<String> { }

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class DefaultBlockCipherService extends JcaCipherService { public DefaultBlockCipherService(String blockCipherAlgorithmName) { super(blockCipherAlgorithmName); } }
evidence_records.explanation: DefaultBlockCipherService extends JcaCipherService, accepting algorithm name. Base class for AesCipherService ('AES') and BlowfishCipherService ('Blowfish'). Wires into JCA cipher dispatch via JcaCipherService.

evidence_records.extracted_content: public enum OperationMode { CBC, CFB, CTR, CTS, ECB, GCM, NONE, OFB, PCBC }

evidence_records.extracted_content: import org.apache.shiro.lang.codec.Base64; import org.apache.shiro.lang.codec.Hex; public abstract class AbstractCryptHash implements Hash { protected String algorithmName; protected byte[] hashedData; protected ByteSource salt; }

evidence_records.extracted_content: public class DefaultHashService implements ConfigurableHashService { private String hashAlgorithmName; private int hashIterations = 1; private RandomNumberGenerator rng = new SecureRandomNumberGenerator(); public Hash computeHash(HashRequest request) { ... } }
